name: [UNIFIED] Tiered Model Router
description: Routes tasks from the main orchestrator to the appropriate model tier (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus) based on complexity scoring. Extends Freddy's sub-agent-runner with Shabbir's Worker Agent 1/2/3 pattern.
design_notes: Pre-routing step: complexity evaluation prompt scores task 1-10
Extends Freddy's sub-agent-runner.json (Research/Content/Data) with model-tier awareness
Shabbir's Worker Agent 1/2/3 already implement this pattern — use as reference
Expected token cost reduction: ~76% vs always routing to Sonnet
